title: Meskwaki Casino
summary: Meskwaki Casino is a Native American casino and hotel located on the Meskwaki Settlement in Tama County, Iowa. It is owned and operated by the Sac and Fox Tribe of the Mississippi in Iowa, and opened in 1992.
text:
Meskwaki Casino is a Native American casino and hotel located on the Meskwaki Settlement in Tama County, Iowa. It is owned and operated by the Sac and Fox Tribe of the Mississippi in Iowa, and opened in 1992.

Property
The casino consists of 67,000 square feet (6,200 m2) of gaming space, filled by tables for stud poker, blackjack, craps, baccarat, roulette, hold 'em, and others. It also features slot machines, keno, bingo, and the sportsbook. The casino abuts a 404-room resort hotel.
